title: Vaessen Creative Tiered Storage Caddy for Scrapbook Embellishments, Jewellery Making Supplies, Bobbins, Sewing Accessories, Craft Tools and More, 31 x 17 x 15 cm
features: CRAFT SUPPLY STORAGE – Easily store and transport your art supplies, jewellery making tools, stickers, embellishments, craft tools, and more in this see-thru storage case. Sort by size, colour or use
MULTI-LAYERED BOX – The functional and spacious storage caddy has one large compartment and two layered trays with a total of ten differently sized compartments
SEE-THROUGH CARRY CASE – The storage carry case is made of high-quality transparent plastic, making it easy to see which craft supplies are inside. The broad handle makes the caddy easy to carry

ORGANISED CRAFT SUPPLIES – Keep your collection of supplies for card making, jewellery design, sewing, scrapbooking or crafting with kids accessible, tidy and in perfect condition by storing them in this handy case
MEASUREMENTS – The case measures 31 x 17 x 15 cm or 12.2 x 6.7 x 5.9 inches
description: From the manufacturer Vaessen Creative Storage Box This high-quality storage box has ten different sized compartments distributed across three levels for sorting, storing and transporting small utensils. The transparent box is made of transparent plastic, so that there is a good overview of the arrangement of the materials from the outside. The organiser measures 31 x 17 x 15 cm, has a hinged lid with a comfortable carry handle and a closure to safely store the craft materials. In this sorting box, small craft materials such as beads, balls, buttons, sequins, gift ribbons, washi tape or stamps, as well as tools for crafts such as scissors, punches and hole punches. The sorting box is also suitable for storing jewellery accessories and sewing accessories. The different materials can be arranged by size, assorted colours and grouped after use, so they are always easy and quick to hand.
